summary: Full e2e testing of Brand Agent page (/brand-agent) - both backend and frontend. All 7 requested features verified and passing. Bedrock chat, influencer card rendering (parser fix), bulk actions, OutreachModal, and send-outreach endpoint all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Re-created test user and session in MongoDB before testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Agent page fully functional. Parser fix confirmed working - Bedrock returns **1. Name (@handle)** format and cards render correctly. Cookie auth: set 'session_token=test_session_e2e_2025' via page.evaluate before navigating. Bedrock takes ~30-45s to respond - use adequate timeouts. All data-testid attributes present: chat-input, send-btn, starter-0..3, new-chat-btn, connect-btn-{handle}, toggle-select-all, send-selected-btn, send-all-btn, outreach-modal, modal-brand-name, modal-budget, modal-product, modal-campaign, modal-audience, send-outreach-btn.

features_verified.brand_agent_page_loads: PASS - chat input, send button, 4 starter prompts, New Chat button all visible
features_verified.bedrock_chat_response: PASS - /api/agent/chat returns 200 with influencer data in **N. Name (@handle)** format
features_verified.parser_fix: PASS - 2 influencer cards rendered correctly after AI response
features_verified.influencer_cards: PASS - cards show name, handle, followers, engagement, email, checkbox + Connect button
features_verified.bulk_action_bar: PASS - Select All, Send to Selected (0), Send to All (2) buttons visible when cards present
features_verified.connect_button_modal: PASS - clicking Connect opens OutreachModal with all 5 form fields
features_verified.modal_form_fields: PASS - Brand Name, Budget, Product/Service, Campaign Details, Target Audience all present
features_verified.send_outreach_api: PASS - /api/agent/send-outreach returns {success:true, message:'Outreach email sent to techmaster@socialcurrent.in'}
features_verified.outreach_email_sends: PASS - OutreachModal shows 'All Emails Sent! 1 sent' confirmation after submit
